Classical routes: Frobenius-Verschiebung composite = [q] plus det-multiplicativity and det([q]) = q^2 with the trace bound; or the Weil pairing over F_q-bar; or point counting #ker(phi - 1) = #E(F_q) with the degree quadratic form
